seoTitle: How to Create an Online Course with Gumroad
metaDescription: Build and sell an online course on Gumroad by uploading videos and materials, organizing lessons, and setting pricing before publishing.
intro: Turning your knowledge into an online course on Gumroad means organizing your content into a clear lesson structure before you ever set a price. This guide covers uploading your course materials, organizing lessons logically, and getting the finished product published and priced.

steps.heading: Create a new course product
steps.body: Start a new product in Gumroad set up specifically to hold course content.

steps.heading: Upload course content
steps.body: Add your videos, PDFs, and any other materials that make up the course.

steps.heading: Organize lessons and materials
steps.body: Arrange your uploaded content into a logical lesson order so students can follow along step by step.

steps.heading: Set pricing and publish course
steps.body: Decide on your course price, review the final listing, and publish it to make it available to students.

faq.question: How should I organize lessons for the best student experience?
faq.answer: Arrange content in a logical progression, typically starting with foundational material before moving into more advanced topics.

faq.question: Can I add materials after the course is already published?
faq.answer: Yes, you can return to your product listing to add or update materials even after the course is live.

faq.question: What file types can I include in a course?
faq.answer: Videos, PDFs, and other common digital file types can all be added as part of a course product on Gumroad.

faq.question: How do I increase student engagement with my course?
faq.answer: Clear organization, quality preview content, and promoting the course to your existing audience all help improve engagement and sales.
